licensematcher.name: Adobe License
licensematcher.desc: If the scanning result is InvalidLicense, you can define matching rules here. Note that quotation marks must be escaped.

licensetext.name: // NOTICE: Adobe permits you to use, modify, and distribute this file in accordance with the terms // of the Adobe license agreement accompanying it.
